channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: FHIR Toolkit - Sat May 09 19:19:03 UTC 2026
item.description:
FHIR Toolkit — productivity tooling for healthcare developers working with FHIR R4. Open any FHIR resource JSON and get inline structural validation against the R4...
vendor: Bipin Adhikari downloads: 11 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.fhirtools.plugin

item.title: GherkinX - Xray Sync - Sun May 10 08:49:25 UTC 2026
item.description:
GherkinX - Xray Sync keeps your local .feature files in sync with Jira Xray test cases - without leaving the IDE. How it works: Configure your Jira URL, Project Key...
vendor: BBekci downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.gherkinx.GherkinX

item.title: LZT Xenforo - Sun May 10 17:21:40 UTC 2026
item.description:
IntelliJ-based plugin for working with XenForo server api from your IDE. Features Project View integration — Templates and Phrases displayed in tree panelOpen &amp...
vendor: Dexsper downloads: 6 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.dexsper.xenforoplugin

item.title: CC Terminal - Tue May 12 02:01:07 UTC 2026
item.description:
A super-lightweight terminal plugin for Claude Code with rich text input support.
vendor: xpc1024 downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.ccterminal

item.title: ShipLens - Mon May 11 16:01:37 UTC 2026
item.description:
A lens from git blame to release version. See which release first shipped any line of code, right in your IDE. The status bar shows the first release tag that contains...
vendor: Ender Wang downloads: 4 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.shiplens.jetbrains

item.title: Nix Pro - Mon May 11 12:44:06 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Jetplugins downloads: 1 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: dev.jetplugins.nix-pro

item.title: Multi AI Chat - Sun May 10 12:48:11 UTC 2026

item.title: PatchTalk - Sun May 10 22:28:53 UTC 2026
item.description:
PatchTalk adds local review-style comment threads to JetBrains editors without requiring a pull request. Comments stay inside the IDE, show up in the line-number...
vendor: kayjikaymchi downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.kaioken.patchtalk

item.title: TaskLens - Sun May 10 12:24:12 UTC 2026
item.description:
TaskLens is an IntelliJ IDEA plugin that analyzes scheduled task execution flow in Spring-based Java applications. It detects methods annotated with @Scheduled, traces...
vendor: minmin downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.nonamecoders.tasklens

item.title: SSH Deploy - Mon May 11 06:32:33 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Linn-cn downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.sshdeploy.SshDeploy

item.title: Branch Scope - Sun May 10 12:26:32 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: BugDigger downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.bugdigger.BranchScope

item.title: budi - Mon May 11 20:47:43 UTC 2026
item.description:
